summary: Implemented and shipped review worklist actions. Added verifier/CLI/docs, applied safe holds and merge-review creation to the real data vault, reduced open manual-review worklist items from 124 to 94 and clusters from 38 to 17, then pushed app commit b2bf96d and data commit 0fe511c.
decisions: Do not auto-approve memory from review worklists; only create merge-review records or hold low-signal/ephemeral candidates.
Apply safe holds to project-state/general/idea clusters because hold is reversible quarantine, not deletion or acceptance.
Commit and push only policy-approved data after the data safety hook passes.
next_steps: Review the remaining 17 clusters, especially durable user preferences and project decisions, to create consolidated accepted memories.
Add a merge executor that can create one reviewed accepted memory from a merge-review record after semantic approval.
Decide whether the older broad dirty candidate/review backlog should be batch-held, reviewed, or left local-only.
